message:
fix(serve,stats): Use active bullets only for health metrics

Change health metrics computations to use active bullets instead of
all bullets for consistency with scoreDistribution and merge candidates:

serve.ts:
- Compute scores from active bullets only
- Count stale bullets from active set only

stats.ts:
- Compute scores/topPerformers/mostHelpful from activeBullets
- Use Number.isFinite() instead of !isNaN() for score validation
- Count stale bullets from active set only
- Fix score distribution labels to match thresholds (>=10, 5-<10)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
